test_cases.title: Verify Wikipedia Homepage Loads
test_cases.description: Navigate to Wikipedia homepage and verify the logo and search bar are present.

steps.description: Navigate to Wikipedia Main Page
Verify the page title contains 'Wikipedia'
Take a snapshot of the homepage

test_cases.expected_result: Wikipedia Main Page loads with logo and search bar visible

test_cases.title: Search for 'Artificial Intelligence' on Wikipedia
test_cases.description: Use the search bar to search for 'Artificial Intelligence' and verify results.

steps.description: Navigate to Wikipedia Main Page
Type 'Artificial Intelligence' in the search box
Click the search button
Verify the article title is 'Artificial intelligence'

test_cases.expected_result: The Artificial Intelligence article page loads

test_cases.title: Verify Wikipedia Navigation Sidebar
test_cases.description: Check that the navigation sidebar contains expected links like 'Main page', 'Contents', 'Current events'.

steps.description: Navigate to Wikipedia Main Page
Take a DOM snapshot to inspect sidebar
Verify 'Main page' link exists in sidebar
Verify 'Contents' link exists in sidebar

test_cases.title: Verify Wikipedia Article Has Table of Contents
test_cases.description: Navigate to a long article and check that it has a table of contents.

steps.description: Navigate to the Python programming language article
Verify article title
Take a snapshot to inspect the page
Verify table of contents is present

test_cases.expected_result: Article loads with a table of contents

test_cases.title: Verify 'Random Article' Link Works
test_cases.description: Click the 'Random article' link in the sidebar and verify a new article loads.

steps.description: Navigate to Wikipedia Main Page
Click the 'Random article' link
Take a snapshot of the random article
Verify we are still on Wikipedia (title contains 'Wikipedia')

test_cases.expected_result: A random Wikipedia article loads successfully

test_cases.title: Verify Wikipedia Language Links
test_cases.description: Check that the Main Page has language links available.

steps.description: Navigate to Wikipedia Main Page
Take a snapshot to inspect language links
Verify language links section exists

test_cases.expected_result: Language links section is present on the page
